# Capital One Venture X Rewards Credit Card

## 🔄 Transfer Program

- Program: Capital One Miles
- Direction: outbound only

## 🤝 Transfer Partners

1. Avianca LifeMiles — 1:1, confirmed

## ⚠️ Transfer Caveats

- Timing disagreement: issuer suggests quick processing while secondary source reports delays (conflicting)
- Transfers are one-way and non-reversible

## 📋 Confidence Notes

- Approved sources disagree on transfer timing for at least one partner.
